_note: Worked example: Northbridge Capital Partners, a fictional institutional investment manager. Portfolio accounting, OMS/EMS trading, security master, custodian position feeds, private asset NAVs, risk/compliance, raw/staging/xref/core/warehouse layers, marts, control views, and DQ views are built as one deterministic SQLite ecosystem.

calendar._note: Capital-markets business-day shape: very low weekends, month/quarter-end close spikes, and muted August/December activity.

tables.name: application
tables.purpose: Application catalog for the investment management landscape.

tables.name: asset_class
tables.purpose: Investment asset-class taxonomy.

tables.name: custodian
tables.purpose: External custodians providing settled positions, cash, and transaction feeds.

tables.name: security
tables.purpose: Tradable public security and externally reported fund/security master.

tables.name: portfolio
tables.purpose: Portfolio/accounting book: pension pools, internal mandates, external mandates, and overlays.

tables.name: strategy_composite_mapping
tables.purpose: Analyst-uploaded portfolio-to-performance-composite mapping used by the performance mart only; stale/conflicting re-uploads are excluded downstream so live coverage is intentionally below 100%.

tables.name: account
tables.purpose: Custodian/accounting account per portfolio and custodian relationship.

tables.name: trade_order
tables.purpose: OMS trade orders before execution/allocation.
tables.grain: one row per portfolio trade order

tables.name: order_event
tables.purpose: Order status history emitted by the OMS lifecycle machine.
tables.grain: one row per order state entered

tables.name: execution
tables.purpose: EMS fills/executions against OMS orders.

tables.name: raw_position
tables.purpose: Custodian settled position file rows before mapping and reconciliation.

tables.name: commitment
tables.purpose: Limited partner commitments by portfolio to private fund vehicles.

tables.name: nav_statement
tables.purpose: Quarterly manager NAV statements for private commitments.
tables.grain: one manager NAV statement per commitment period/version

tables.name: guideline_rule
tables.purpose: Investment guideline/compliance rule catalog.

tables.name: guideline_breach
tables.purpose: Guideline breach workflow items emitted by overnight monitoring.
tables.grain: one detected guideline breach per portfolio/rule/date

tables.name: guideline_breach_event
tables.purpose: Guideline breach workflow status history.
tables.grain: one row per breach state entered

tables.name: file_load
tables.purpose: Batch/API feed load log for custodian, security, price, and manager files.

tables.name: job
tables.purpose: Scheduled inbound feed, warehouse refresh, procedure, and outbound extract jobs tied to cataloged code objects.

tables.name: job_run
tables.purpose: Historical execution log for scheduled feed loads, procedures, snapshot refreshes, and extracts, including failed and partial runs.
tables.grain: one row per scheduled job execution

cases.failed: Source file failed checksum or procedure lock timeout.
cases.partial: Loaded with rejected rows routed to DQ quarantine.

tables.name: code_object
tables.purpose: Executable code catalog: self-registered SQLite views plus modeled procedures, functions and outbound extract definitions.

tables.name: lineage_edge
tables.purpose: Object-level lineage edges linking landed feeds, staging, warehouse facts, views, procedures, snapshots, extracts, and workflow queues.

tables.name: recon_run
tables.purpose: Control execution log for portfolio/accounting reconciliations.

tables.name: rule
tables.purpose: Data-quality rule catalog for the current-result view.

cases.11: manual composite mapping stale or conflicting

tables.name: custodian_position_extract
tables.purpose: Verbatim custodian settled-position file rows with file and batch metadata; resent files can repeat the same source row.

tables.name: custodian_position
tables.purpose: Typed custodian position staging with guarded date parsing and deduplication of resent custodian position files.

tables.name: custodian_transaction_file
tables.purpose: Verbatim custodian settled-transaction file rows with source transaction references, file batches, and ingestion timestamps.

tables.name: custodian_transaction
tables.purpose: Typed custodian transaction staging with guarded trade/settle date parsing and deduplication of resent custodian transaction files.

tables.name: oms_trade_extract
tables.purpose: Nightly OMS/EMS trade extract as landed from trading systems with file/batch and ingestion metadata.

tables.name: oms_trade
tables.purpose: Typed OMS/EMS trade extract staging with guarded date parsing.

tables.name: security_master_vendor_feed
tables.purpose: Daily vendor security-master feed landing table with file and batch metadata.

tables.name: security_master_vendor
tables.purpose: Typed security-master vendor staging with guarded date parsing.

tables.name: private_asset_manager_statement
tables.purpose: Private-asset manager statement landing rows with manager file metadata and ingestion timestamps.

tables.name: private_asset_manager_statement
tables.purpose: Typed private-asset manager statement staging with guarded valuation/received date parsing.

tables.name: security_identifier_map
tables.purpose: Crosswalk from custodian security ids to internal security master ids.

tables.name: holding_position
tables.purpose: Canonical mapped holding positions sourced from deduped custodian position staging.

tables.name: dim_portfolio
tables.purpose: Portfolio dimension for warehouse facts and views.

tables.name: dim_security
tables.purpose: Security dimension conformed from staged security-master vendor data.

tables.name: dim_date
tables.purpose: Calendar dimension used by holding and trade normalized views.

tables.name: dim_custodian
tables.purpose: Custodian dimension for warehouse holdings and custodian transaction facts.

tables.name: fact_trade_allocation
tables.purpose: Trade allocation fact sourced from staged OMS/EMS executions and custodian account context.

tables.name: fact_holding_daily
tables.purpose: Daily holding-position fact derived from mapped custodian positions.

tables.name: month_end_aum_snapshot
tables.purpose: SQLite-modeled materialized view: month-end portfolio AUM snapshot refreshed from business AUM views.
tables.grain: one row per portfolio per month-end snapshot

tables.name: mapping_request_queue
tables.purpose: Workflow queue seeded by portfolios that fall to UNASSIGNED in the performance composite AUM mart.

derivations.name: raw_custodian_position_extract
sql: insert into raw.custodian_position_extract

with base as (select raw_position_id,account_id,portfolio_id,custodian_id,custodian_security_id,security_id,position_date,quantity,market_value,feed_file_name,loaded_at,'POS-'||strftime('%Y%m%d',position_date)||'-'||custodian_id as file_batch_id from custodian.raw_position)

select raw_position_id,cast(raw_position_id as text),cast(account_id as text),portfolio_id,custodian_id,custodian_security_id,security_id,strftime('%m/%d/%Y',position_date),quantity,market_value,feed_file_name,file_batch_id,loaded_at from base union all select 9000000+raw_position_id,cast(raw_position_id as text),cast(account_id as text),portfolio_id,custodian_id,custodian_security_id,security_id,strftime('%m/%d/%Y',position_date),quantity,market_value,replace(feed_file_name,'.csv','_RESENT.csv'),file_batch_id||'-RESENT',datetime(loaded_at,'+90 minutes') from base where raw_position_id % 37 = 0;

derivations.name: raw_custodian_transaction_file
sql: insert into raw.custodian_transaction_file

with acct as (select portfolio_id,min(account_id) account_id,min(custodian_id) custodian_id from portfolio.account group by portfolio_id), base as (select e.execution_id,a.account_id,e.portfolio_id,a.custodian_id,e.security_id,'CTXN-'||printf('%08d',e.execution_id) transaction_ref,e.side transaction_type,e.fill_qty quantity,e.fill_price price,e.gross_amount,e.execution_date,'CUSTTXN-'||strftime('%Y%m%d',e.execution_date)||'-'||a.custodian_id file_batch_id,datetime(e.execution_date||' 05:15:00') ingested_at from trading.execution e join acct a on a.portfolio_id=e.portfolio_id)

select execution_id,cast(execution_id as text),cast(account_id as text),portfolio_id,custodian_id,security_id,transaction_ref,transaction_type,quantity,price,gross_amount,strftime('%m/%d/%Y',execution_date),strftime('%m/%d/%Y',date(execution_date,'+2 days')),file_batch_id,ingested_at from base union all select 9100000+execution_id,cast(execution_id as text),cast(account_id as text),portfolio_id,custodian_id,security_id,transaction_ref,transaction_type,quantity,price,gross_amount,strftime('%m/%d/%Y',execution_date),strftime('%m/%d/%Y',date(execution_date,'+2 days')),file_batch_id||'-RESENT',datetime(ingested_at,'+75 minutes') from base where execution_id % 41 = 0;

derivations.name: raw_oms_trade_extract
sql: insert into raw.oms_trade_extract

select e.execution_id,cast(o.order_id as text),cast(e.execution_id as text),cast(e.portfolio_id as text),cast(e.security_id as text),e.side,e.order_qty,e.fill_qty,o.limit_price,e.fill_price,o.order_date,e.execution_date,'OMS-'||strftime('%Y%m%d',e.execution_date),case when datetime(e.executed_at,'+20 minutes') > '2025-12-31 23:59:59' then '2025-12-31 23:59:59' else datetime(e.executed_at,'+20 minutes') end from trading.execution e join trading.trade_order o on o.order_id=e.order_id;

derivations.name: raw_security_master_vendor_feed
sql: insert into raw.security_master_vendor_feed

select security_id,cast(security_id as text),security_uid,isin,cusip,security_name,asset_class_code,currency,replace(issue_date,'-',''),active_flag,'SECMSTR-'||strftime('%Y%m%d',issue_date),datetime(issue_date||' 03:00:00') from sec.security;

derivations.name: raw_private_asset_manager_statement
sql: insert into raw.private_asset_manager_statement

select n.nav_statement_id,cast(n.nav_statement_id as text),cast(n.commitment_id as text),c.commitment_ref,cast(n.portfolio_id as text),c.fund_name,c.strategy,strftime('%m/%d/%Y',n.valuation_date),n.received_at,n.statement_version,n.nav_amount,'PMSTMT-'||strftime('%Y%m',n.valuation_date)||'-'||n.portfolio_id,n.received_at from private.nav_statement n join private.commitment c on c.commitment_id=n.commitment_id;

derivations.name: stg_custodian_position
sql: insert into stg.custodian_position
with ranked as (select r.*,row_number() over (partition by raw_position_ref order by ingested_at desc,file_batch_id desc,raw_landing_id desc) rn from raw.custodian_position_extract r)

select cast(raw_position_ref as integer),cast(account_ref as integer),portfolio_id,custodian_id,custodian_security_id,security_id,case when source_position_date like '__/__/____' then substr(source_position_date,7,4)||'-'||substr(source_position_date,1,2)||'-'||substr(source_position_date,4,2) else null end,quantity,market_value,file_name,file_batch_id,ingested_at,case when source_position_date like '__/__/____' then 'parsed' else 'date_parse_error' end,rn from ranked where rn=1;

derivations.name: stg_custodian_transaction
sql: insert into stg.custodian_transaction
with ranked as (select r.*,row_number() over (partition by source_transaction_id order by ingested_at desc,file_batch_id desc,raw_txn_file_id desc) rn from raw.custodian_transaction_file r)

select cast(source_transaction_id as integer),cast(account_ref as integer),portfolio_id,custodian_id,security_id,transaction_ref,transaction_type,quantity,price,gross_amount,case when source_trade_date like '__/__/____' then substr(source_trade_date,7,4)||'-'||substr(source_trade_date,1,2)||'-'||substr(source_trade_date,4,2) else null end,case when source_settle_date like '__/__/____' then substr(source_settle_date,7,4)||'-'||substr(source_settle_date,1,2)||'-'||substr(source_settle_date,4,2) else null end,file_batch_id,ingested_at,case when source_trade_date like '__/__/____' and source_settle_date like '__/__/____' then 'parsed' else 'date_parse_error' end,rn from ranked where rn=1;

derivations.name: stg_oms_trade
sql: insert into stg.oms_trade

select cast(execution_id as integer),cast(order_id as integer),cast(portfolio_ref as integer),cast(security_ref as integer),side,order_qty,fill_qty,limit_price,fill_price,case when source_order_date like '____-__-__' then source_order_date else null end,case when source_execution_date like '____-__-__' then source_execution_date else null end,file_batch_id,ingested_at,case when source_order_date like '____-__-__' and source_execution_date like '____-__-__' then 'parsed' else 'date_parse_error' end from raw.oms_trade_extract;

derivations.name: stg_security_master_vendor
sql: insert into stg.security_master_vendor

select cast(security_id_ref as integer),vendor_security_ref,isin,cusip,trim(security_name),asset_class_code,currency,case when source_issue_date like '________' then substr(source_issue_date,1,4)||'-'||substr(source_issue_date,5,2)||'-'||substr(source_issue_date,7,2) else null end,active_flag,file_batch_id,ingested_at,case when source_issue_date like '________' then 'parsed' else 'date_parse_error' end from raw.security_master_vendor_feed;

derivations.name: stg_private_asset_manager_statement
sql: insert into stg.private_asset_manager_statement

select cast(nav_statement_ref as integer),cast(commitment_id_ref as integer),cast(portfolio_ref as integer),fund_name,strategy,case when source_valuation_date like '__/__/____' then substr(source_valuation_date,7,4)||'-'||substr(source_valuation_date,1,2)||'-'||substr(source_valuation_date,4,2) else null end,case when source_received_at like '____-__-__%' then source_received_at else null end,statement_version,nav_amount,file_batch_id,ingested_at,case when source_valuation_date like '__/__/____' and source_received_at like '____-__-__%' then 'parsed' else 'date_parse_error' end from raw.private_asset_manager_statement;

derivations.name: xref_security_identifier_map
sql: insert into xref.security_identifier_map

select row_number() over (order by custodian_security_id),'CustoLink',custodian_security_id,min(security_id),min(position_date),null,1 from stg.custodian_position where position_date is not null group by custodian_security_id;

derivations.name: core_holding_position
sql: insert into core.holding_position

select s.raw_position_id,s.portfolio_id,s.account_id,s.custodian_id,x.security_id,s.position_date,s.quantity,s.market_value,case when x.security_id is not null then 1 else 0 end,s.file_batch_id from stg.custodian_position s left join xref.security_identifier_map x on x.source_security_id=s.custodian_security_id and x.active_flag=1 where s.position_date is not null;

derivations.name: wh_dimensions
sql: insert into wh.dim_portfolio select portfolio_id,portfolio_code,portfolio_name,portfolio_type,asset_class_bias,base_currency,status,aum_tier from portfolio.portfolio;
insert into wh.dim_security select security_id,security_uid,security_name,asset_class_code,currency,issue_date,active_flag from stg.security_master_vendor;
insert into wh.dim_custodian select custodian_id,custodian_code,custodian_name,feed_protocol,active_flag from ref.custodian;

insert into wh.dim_date with recursive d(dt) as (select date('2024-01-01') union all select date(dt,'+1 day') from d where dt<'2025-12-31') select dt,cast(strftime('%Y',dt) as integer),cast(strftime('%m',dt) as integer),substr(dt,1,7),cast(strftime('%d',dt) as integer),cast(strftime('%w',dt) as integer),case when strftime('%w',dt) in ('0','6') then 1 else 0 end,case when date(dt,'+1 day')=date(dt,'start of month','+1 month') then 1 else 0 end from d;

derivations.name: wh_fact_trade_allocation
sql: insert into wh.fact_trade_allocation

with acct as (select portfolio_id,min(custodian_id) custodian_id from portfolio.account group by portfolio_id) select t.execution_id,t.execution_date,t.execution_date,t.order_id,t.execution_id,t.portfolio_id,a.custodian_id,t.security_id,t.side,t.fill_qty,t.fill_price,round(t.fill_qty*t.fill_price,2),case when t.side='BUY' then round(t.fill_qty*t.fill_price,2) else -round(t.fill_qty*t.fill_price,2) end from stg.oms_trade t left join acct a on a.portfolio_id=t.portfolio_id where t.execution_date is not null;

derivations.name: wh_fact_holding_daily
sql: insert into wh.fact_holding_daily

select h.holding_position_id,h.position_date,h.position_date,h.portfolio_id,h.account_id,h.custodian_id,h.security_id,coalesce(s.asset_class_code,'UNMAPPED'),h.quantity,h.market_value,h.mapped_flag from core.holding_position h left join wh.dim_security s on s.security_key=h.security_id;

derivations.name: nv_holding_detail
sql: create view nv_holding_detail as

select f.holding_key,f.position_date,d.month_key,d.is_month_end,f.portfolio_id,p.portfolio_code,p.portfolio_name,p.portfolio_type,p.asset_class_bias as source_strategy,f.account_id,f.custodian_id,c.custodian_code,c.custodian_name,f.security_id,coalesce(s.security_uid,'UNMAPPED') security_uid,coalesce(s.security_name,'Unmapped security') security_name,f.asset_class_code,coalesce(s.currency,'USD') security_currency,f.quantity,f.market_value,f.mapped_flag from wh.fact_holding_daily f join wh.dim_portfolio p on p.portfolio_key=f.portfolio_id left join wh.dim_security s on s.security_key=f.security_id left join wh.dim_custodian c on c.custodian_key=f.custodian_id left join wh.dim_date d on d.date_key=f.date_key;

derivations.name: nv_trade_detail
sql: create view nv_trade_detail as

select f.allocation_key,f.allocation_date,d.month_key,f.order_id,f.execution_id,f.portfolio_id,p.portfolio_code,p.portfolio_name,p.portfolio_type,p.asset_class_bias as source_strategy,f.custodian_id,c.custodian_code,c.custodian_name,f.security_id,s.security_uid,s.security_name,s.asset_class_code,s.currency as security_currency,f.side,f.quantity,f.price,f.gross_amount,f.net_amount from wh.fact_trade_allocation f join wh.dim_portfolio p on p.portfolio_key=f.portfolio_id left join wh.dim_security s on s.security_key=f.security_id left join wh.dim_custodian c on c.custodian_key=f.custodian_id left join wh.dim_date d on d.date_key=f.date_key;

derivations.name: bv_holdings_rollforward
sql: create view bv_holdings_rollforward as

with month_pos as (select month_key,portfolio_id,portfolio_code,source_strategy,security_id,security_name,max(position_date) month_end_date,round(sum(market_value),2) ending_market_value,sum(quantity) ending_quantity from nv_holding_detail group by month_key,portfolio_id,portfolio_code,source_strategy,security_id,security_name), trades as (select month_key,portfolio_id,security_id,round(sum(case when side='BUY' then gross_amount else 0 end),2) purchases,round(sum(case when side='SELL' then gross_amount else 0 end),2) sales from nv_trade_detail group by month_key,portfolio_id,security_id) select m.month_key,m.month_end_date,m.portfolio_id,m.portfolio_code,m.source_strategy,m.security_id,m.security_name,coalesce(lag(m.ending_market_value) over (partition by m.portfolio_id,m.security_id order by m.month_key),0) beginning_market_value,coalesce(t.purchases,0) purchases,coalesce(t.sales,0) sales,round(m.ending_market_value-coalesce(lag(m.ending_market_value) over (partition by m.portfolio_id,m.security_id order by m.month_key),0)-coalesce(t.purchases,0)+coalesce(t.sales,0),2) market_movement,m.ending_market_value,m.ending_quantity from month_pos m left join trades t on t.month_key=m.month_key and t.portfolio_id=m.portfolio_id and t.security_id=m.security_id;

derivations.name: bv_aum_by_strategy
sql: create view bv_aum_by_strategy as

select month_key,month_end_date,source_strategy,count(distinct portfolio_id) portfolios,count(distinct security_id) securities,round(sum(ending_market_value),2) aum_market_value from bv_holdings_rollforward group by month_key,month_end_date,source_strategy;

derivations.name: bv_guideline_breach_funnel
sql: create view bv_guideline_breach_funnel as

select substr(detected_date,1,7) breach_month,severity,status,count(*) breaches,round(sum(exposure_amount),2) exposure_amount,sum(case when waiver_flag=1 then 1 else 0 end) waived_breaches,round(avg(case when status in ('cured','waiver_granted','false_positive') then 1.0 else 0.0 end),4) closed_share from risk.guideline_breach group by substr(detected_date,1,7),severity,status;

derivations.name: mv_month_end_aum_snapshot
sql: insert into mv.month_end_aum_snapshot

with latest as (select month_key,portfolio_id,max(month_end_date) snapshot_date from bv_holdings_rollforward group by month_key,portfolio_id), snap as (select r.month_key,l.snapshot_date,r.portfolio_id,max(r.portfolio_code) portfolio_code,max(r.source_strategy) source_strategy,count(distinct h.custodian_id) custodian_count,count(*) position_rows,round(sum(r.ending_market_value),2) market_value from bv_holdings_rollforward r join latest l on l.month_key=r.month_key and l.portfolio_id=r.portfolio_id and l.snapshot_date=r.month_end_date left join nv_holding_detail h on h.month_key=r.month_key and h.portfolio_id=r.portfolio_id and h.security_id=r.security_id and h.position_date=r.month_end_date group by r.month_key,l.snapshot_date,r.portfolio_id) select row_number() over (order by month_key,portfolio_id),month_key,snapshot_date,portfolio_id,portfolio_code,source_strategy,custodian_count,position_rows,market_value,'MV-AUM-'||replace(month_key,'-','') from snap;

derivations.name: mart_performance_aum_by_strategy
sql: create view mart_performance_aum_by_strategy as

with active_mapping as (select portfolio_id,composite_code,composite_name,source_strategy,effective_start_date,effective_end_date,row_number() over (partition by portfolio_id order by uploaded_at desc,mapping_id desc) rn from manual.strategy_composite_mapping where approved_flag=1 and current_flag=1 and stale_flag=0 and conflict_flag=0 and portfolio_id % 11 != 0) select s.snapshot_month,coalesce(m.composite_code,'UNASSIGNED') composite_code,coalesce(m.composite_name,'UNASSIGNED') composite_name,s.source_strategy,count(distinct s.portfolio_id) portfolios,round(sum(s.market_value),2) performance_aum from mv.month_end_aum_snapshot s left join active_mapping m on m.portfolio_id=s.portfolio_id and m.rn=1 and s.snapshot_date>=m.effective_start_date and (m.effective_end_date is null or s.snapshot_date<=m.effective_end_date) group by s.snapshot_month,coalesce(m.composite_code,'UNASSIGNED'),coalesce(m.composite_name,'UNASSIGNED'),s.source_strategy;

derivations.name: mart_performance_composite_proxy
sql: create view mart_performance_composite_proxy as

select snapshot_month,composite_code,composite_name,portfolios,performance_aum,round(((abs(length(composite_code))+cast(substr(snapshot_month,6,2) as integer))%140-45)/10000.0,4) return_proxy,round(performance_aum*(1.0+(((abs(length(composite_code))+cast(substr(snapshot_month,6,2) as integer))%140-45)/10000.0)),2) linked_value_proxy from mart_performance_aum_by_strategy;

derivations.name: mart_clientreporting_aum_by_strategy
sql: create view mart_clientreporting_aum_by_strategy as

with private_nav as (select substr(valuation_date,1,7) month_key,portfolio_id,strategy,round(sum(nav_amount),2) private_statement_nav from stg.private_asset_manager_statement where valuation_date is not null group by substr(valuation_date,1,7),portfolio_id,strategy) select s.snapshot_month,s.source_strategy client_strategy,count(distinct s.portfolio_id) portfolios,round(sum(s.market_value),2) custodian_reported_aum,round(coalesce(sum(p.private_statement_nav),0),2) private_statement_nav,round(sum(s.market_value)+coalesce(sum(p.private_statement_nav),0),2) client_reporting_aum from mv.month_end_aum_snapshot s left join private_nav p on p.month_key=s.snapshot_month and p.portfolio_id=s.portfolio_id group by s.snapshot_month,s.source_strategy;

derivations.name: mart_clientreporting_statement_inventory
sql: create view mart_clientreporting_statement_inventory as

select substr(valuation_date,1,7) statement_month,strategy,count(distinct commitment_id) commitments,count(*) statement_rows,round(sum(nav_amount),2) statement_nav from stg.private_asset_manager_statement where valuation_date is not null group by substr(valuation_date,1,7),strategy;

derivations.name: control_recon_custodian_vs_ibor
sql: create view control_recon_custodian_vs_ibor as

with c as (select portfolio_id,security_id,position_date,round(sum(market_value),2) custodian_mv from wh.fact_holding_daily group by 1,2,3), t as (select portfolio_id,security_id,allocation_date position_date,round(sum(net_amount),2) ibor_trade_mv from wh.fact_trade_allocation group by 1,2,3) select c.portfolio_id,c.security_id,c.position_date,c.custodian_mv,coalesce(t.ibor_trade_mv,0) ibor_trade_mv,round(c.custodian_mv-coalesce(t.ibor_trade_mv,0),2) break_amount from c left join t on t.portfolio_id=c.portfolio_id and t.security_id=c.security_id and t.position_date=c.position_date where abs(c.custodian_mv-coalesce(t.ibor_trade_mv,0))>1000000 limit 5000;

derivations.name: control_private_nav_restatement
sql: create view control_private_nav_restatement as
select commitment_id,valuation_date,count(*) versions,round(sum(nav_amount),2) net_nav_versions from private.nav_statement group by 1,2 having count(*)>1;

derivations.name: control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum
sql: create view control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum as

with perf as (select snapshot_month,round(sum(performance_aum),2) performance_aum from mart_performance_aum_by_strategy group by snapshot_month), client as (select snapshot_month,round(sum(client_reporting_aum),2) client_reporting_aum from mart_clientreporting_aum_by_strategy group by snapshot_month) select coalesce(p.snapshot_month,c.snapshot_month) snapshot_month,coalesce(p.performance_aum,0) performance_aum,coalesce(c.client_reporting_aum,0) client_reporting_aum,round(coalesce(c.client_reporting_aum,0)-coalesce(p.performance_aum,0),2) aum_delta,case when abs(coalesce(c.client_reporting_aum,0)-coalesce(p.performance_aum,0))>1000000 then 'private_nav_in_client_reporting' else 'within_tolerance' end break_type from perf p left join client c on c.snapshot_month=p.snapshot_month where abs(coalesce(c.client_reporting_aum,0)-coalesce(p.performance_aum,0))>1000000;

derivations.name: dq_rule_result_current
sql: create view dq_rule_result_current as

select 'DQ-001' rule_code,'duplicate security names' issue,cast(security_id as text) entity_id from sec.security s where exists (select 1 from sec.security s2 where s2.security_name=s.security_name and s2.security_id<>s.security_id) union all select 'DQ-002','custodian position security not in security master',cast(raw_position_id as text) from custodian.raw_position rp where not exists (select 1 from sec.security s where s.security_id=rp.security_id) union all select 'DQ-003','unparseable custodian position date',cast(raw_landing_id as text) from raw.custodian_position_extract where source_position_date not like '__/__/____' union all select 'DQ-004','active security mapping past valid_to',cast(security_map_id as text) from xref.security_identifier_map where active_flag=1 and valid_to is not null and valid_to<'2025-12-31' union all select 'DQ-005','duplicate feed load file',file_name from integration.file_load group by file_name having count(*)>1 union all select 'DQ-006','manual guideline waiver',cast(breach_id as text) from risk.guideline_breach where waiver_flag=1 union all select 'DQ-007','staged custodian security missing map',cast(raw_position_id as text) from stg.custodian_position sp where not exists (select 1 from xref.security_identifier_map x where x.source_security_id=sp.custodian_security_id and x.active_flag=1) union all select 'DQ-008','trade order blocked by compliance',cast(order_id as text) from trading.trade_order where status='compliance_blocked' union all select 'DQ-009','NAV restatement reason present',cast(nav_statement_id as text) from private.nav_statement where restatement_reason is not null union all select 'DQ-010','portfolio unassigned in performance composite mapping',snapshot_month||':'||source_strategy from mart_performance_aum_by_strategy where composite_code='UNASSIGNED' union all select 'DQ-011','manual strategy mapping stale or conflicting',cast(mapping_id as text) from manual.strategy_composite_mapping where stale_flag=1 or conflict_flag=1 or approved_flag=0 or current_flag=0 union all select 'DQ-012','integration job failed or partial',cast(run_id as text) from integration.job_run where run_status in ('failed','partial') union all select 'DQ-013','performance and client-reporting AUM definitions differ',snapshot_month from control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum;

derivations.name: workflow_mapping_request_queue
sql: insert into workflow.mapping_request_queue

select row_number() over (order by p.snapshot_month,p.source_strategy),'MAP-'||replace(p.snapshot_month,'-','')||'-'||printf('%04d',row_number() over (order by p.snapshot_month,p.source_strategy)),min(s.portfolio_id),min(s.portfolio_code),p.source_strategy,'strategy_composite_mapping_request',case when sum(p.performance_aum)>=50000000 then 'high' when sum(p.performance_aum)>=10000000 then 'medium' else 'low' end,'open','performance_mapping',datetime(p.snapshot_month||'-15 09:00:00'),datetime(p.snapshot_month||'-20 17:00:00'),'mart_performance_aum_by_strategy' from mart_performance_aum_by_strategy p join mv.month_end_aum_snapshot s on s.snapshot_month=p.snapshot_month and s.source_strategy=p.source_strategy where p.composite_code='UNASSIGNED' group by p.snapshot_month,p.source_strategy;

derivations.name: catalog_code_object
sql: insert into catalog.code_object

select row_number() over (order by name),case when name like 'nv_%' then 'nv' when name like 'bv_%' then 'bv' when name like 'mart_performance_%' then 'mart_performance' when name like 'mart_clientreporting_%' then 'mart_clientreporting' when name like 'control_%' then 'control' when name like 'dq_%' then 'dq' else 'view' end,name,'view','sqlite',sql,case when name like 'mart_performance_%' then 'performance_analytics' when name like 'mart_clientreporting_%' then 'client_reporting' when name like 'control_%' then 'investment_controls' else 'analytics_engineering' end,'2024-01-15 09:00:00','2025-12-31 05:45:00','deployed',null from sqlite_master where type='view' and name not like 'sqlite_%' union all select 1001,'procedure','proc_nightly_position_roll','procedure','sqlserver','create procedure proc_nightly_position_roll as insert into wh_fact_holding_daily select holding_position_id, position_date, position_date, portfolio_id, account_id, custodian_id, security_id, ''ASSET'', quantity, market_value, mapped_flag from core_holding_position;','investment_data_platform','2024-03-01 09:00:00','2025-12-28 04:10:00','deployed','Rebuilds daily position roll-forward after custodian files land' union all select 1002,'procedure','proc_rebuild_performance_composites','procedure','sqlserver','create procedure proc_rebuild_performance_composites as select snapshot_month, composite_code, sum(performance_aum) from mart_performance_aum_by_strategy group by snapshot_month, composite_code;','performance_analytics','2024-04-01 09:00:00','2025-12-31 05:20:00','deployed','Rebuilds composite AUM and return proxy after mapping uploads' union all select 1003,'procedure','proc_refresh_mv_month_end_aum_snapshot','procedure','sqlserver','create procedure proc_refresh_mv_month_end_aum_snapshot as delete from mv_month_end_aum_snapshot; insert into mv_month_end_aum_snapshot select * from bv_aum_by_strategy;','analytics_engineering','2024-05-01 09:00:00','2025-12-31 05:30:00','deployed','Modeled materialized-view refresh procedure' union all select 1004,'function','fn_fx_convert_to_base','function','sql','create function fn_fx_convert_to_base(amount numeric, fx_rate numeric) returns numeric as begin return round(amount * coalesce(fx_rate, 1), 2); end;','market_data','2024-02-15 09:00:00','2025-10-11 13:15:00','deployed','Used by warehouse procedures where non-USD holdings are converted to base currency' union all select 1005,'extract','extract_client_statement_positions','extract','sql','select snapshot_month, client_strategy, client_reporting_aum from mart_clientreporting_aum_by_strategy where snapshot_month = :period for csv sftp client-reporting;','client_reporting','2024-06-01 09:00:00','2025-12-31 07:00:00','deployed','Monthly client statement AUM extract' union all select 1006,'extract','extract_regulatory_holdings','extract','sql','select position_date, portfolio_code, security_uid, market_value from nv_holding_detail where position_date = :as_of_date for pipe delimited regulatory portal;','regulatory_reporting','2024-06-15 09:00:00','2025-12-31 07:30:00','deployed','Month-end holdings extract for regulatory filing';

12,'bv_holdings_rollforward','mv.month_end_aum_snapshot','proc_refresh_mv_month_end_aum_snapshot','business_view_to_materialized_table','2025-12-31 06:00:00' union all select 13,'manual.strategy_composite_mapping','mart_performance_aum_by_strategy','mart_performance_aum_by_strategy','manual_mapping_to_bu_view','2025-12-31 06:00:00' union all select 15,'mart_performance_aum_by_strategy','control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum','control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum','bu_metric_reconciliation','2025-12-31 06:00:00' union all select 16,'mart_clientreporting_aum_by_strategy','control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum','control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum','bu_metric_reconciliation','2025-12-31 06:00:00' union all select imperfections.name: security_duplicate_setup
imperfections.scenario: Vendor and custodian identifiers create near-duplicate securities; DQ-001 catches the duplicate-name population.

imperfections.name: security_name_typos
imperfections.scenario: Manual security setup typo before steward review.

imperfections.name: custodian_security_orphans
imperfections.scenario: Custodian sends a position for an unapproved security id; DQ-002 and DQ-007 catch it.

imperfections.name: feed_late_arrivals
imperfections.scenario: Custodian or market-data files arrive after the warehouse cutoff.

imperfections.name: manual_guideline_waivers
imperfections.scenario: CIO-approved waivers are visible in DQ-006.

imperfections.name: file_load_duplicates
imperfections.scenario: SFTP resend lands the same file twice; DQ-005 dedupe queue catches it.

imperfections.name: raw_position_date_drift
imperfections.scenario: Custodian changes date padding; staging cannot parse the padded rows.

imperfections.name: missing_security_maps
imperfections.scenario: Security crosswalk rows missing after onboarding a new custodian.

imperfections.name: stale_security_maps
imperfections.scenario: Expired custodian identifier mappings remain active.

imperfections.name: private_nav_restatements
imperfections.scenario: Quarterly manager NAV corrections create reversal/restated versions and valuation review work.

controls.rule_name: Custodian market value reconciles to IBOR trade/holding view
controls.expected_break_rate: timing and mapping breaks visible in control_recon_custodian_vs_ibor

controls.rule_name: Performance AUM reconciles to client-reporting AUM definition
controls.expected_break_rate: private NAV statements included in client reporting but not performance composites

dq_rules.condition: security names should not duplicate across active ids
raw positions reference a known security
source position date parses as MM/DD/YYYY
staged securities have active crosswalk mappings
blocked trades remain visible for compliance review
portfolio has assigned performance composite mapping
manual mappings are approved, current, non-stale, and non-conflicting
performance and client reporting AUM deltas are explained

dataflows.name: trade_to_settle
dataflows.sequence: portfolio.portfolio -> trading.trade_order -> trade_order_lifecycle -> execution -> raw.oms_trade_extract -> stg.oms_trade -> wh.fact_trade_allocation -> nv_trade_detail

dataflows.name: custodian_position_recon
dataflows.sequence: custodian.raw_position -> raw.custodian_position_extract -> stg.custodian_position -> xref.security_identifier_map -> core.holding_position -> wh.fact_holding_daily -> nv_holding_detail -> control_recon_custodian_vs_ibor

dataflows.name: private_nav_rollforward
dataflows.sequence: private.commitment -> private.nav_statement -> raw.private_asset_manager_statement -> stg.private_asset_manager_statement -> mart_clientreporting_aum_by_strategy -> control_private_nav_restatement

dataflows.name: aum_view_stack
dataflows.sequence: wh facts -> nv_holding_detail/nv_trade_detail -> bv_holdings_rollforward/bv_aum_by_strategy -> mv.month_end_aum_snapshot -> mart_performance_* and mart_clientreporting_* -> control_recon_performance_vs_client_aum

dataflows.name: code_catalog_lineage
dataflows.sequence: sqlite_master views + procedure/function/extract rows -> catalog.code_object -> catalog.lineage_edge -> integration.job/job_run

dataflows.name: guideline_monitoring
dataflows.sequence: risk.guideline_rule -> guideline_breach -> breach workflow -> bv_guideline_breach_funnel -> dq_rule_result_current
